name: sgs/timeline
title: SGS Timeline
description: Date-based timeline with vertical or horizontal orientation and scroll-reveal animation.

wrapper.label: Wrapper
wrapper._note: Root <ol> — no `layer` declared (leaf content block, no grid/flex attrs despite align:wide/full). block.json's native `typography` support is declared here but rendered via `selectors.typography` against `.sgs-timeline__title` (render.php:258-268), NOT this root — see the `title` element below, which owns the text-cluster typography members instead. borderWidth/borderColour/borderStyle are custom scalar/object attrs (no WP-native per-side width support), verified live in render.php:143-155.

title.label: Entry title
title._note: block.json declares `selectors.typography: '.sgs-timeline__title'`, so the root's native typography support paints the entry TITLE, not the wrapper — declared on its own element to reflect where it actually renders. No independent title colour control exists (colour is the shared wrapper `color.text`) — honest gap.

connector.label: Connector line / node
connector._note: connectorColour drives the `--sgs-connector-colour` custom property, painted as `background-color` on the connector line + node dot (style.scss:64, 84-96, 236, 244-256, 316, 334) — a scoped CSS-var mechanism, not a WP-native background. No prefix declared (connectorColour does not follow the `{prefix}Colour` convention for an element named `connector`) — resolved via explicit attrMap only.

date.label: Entry date
date._note: dateColour drives `--sgs-date-colour`, applied via a `:not([style*='color'])` CSS fallback on `.sgs-timeline__date` (style.scss:358-360) so an inline colour override always wins. Resolves via default convention (`date`+`Colour`).

entry.label: Timeline entry
entry._note: Per-entry fields (date/title/description/icon/image) are plain repeater content from the `entries` array — no independent per-entry style controls exist beyond the block-wide title/date/connector colours above. `imageControls: true` governs the per-entry image via the universal image-controls extension, not a manifest element. Mirrors sgs/accordion's `item` element and sgs/quote's `quote-body`.

entries.title: Company Founded
entries.description: Our story began with a vision and a handshake.

entries.title: First Milestone
entries.description: Reached an important milestone in our growth.
